eyebrow.zh: 数字公民破解 · 一年级

chrome.sub: A password is like a secret key. Keep yours safe! Solve four locks with the clues.
chrome.briefP: A password is a secret word that keeps your things safe, like a key to your house. A Password Pal keeps their password private and does not share it. Read the clues. Then open all four locks. Each lock shows you why keeping your password safe is smart.
chrome.footerText: Digital Citizenship Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You know a password is a secret key. You keep yours private. You do not share it. You ask a grown-up for help. You are a true Password Pal!

clues.title: A password is a key
clues.body: A password is like a key. It keeps your things safe. Only you should know it. Keep it a secret.

clues.title: Do not tell anyone
clues.body: Do not tell your password to friends. Do not type it in a chat. A private password stays safe.

clues.title: A grown-up can help
clues.body: You can tell a password to a parent or teacher who helps you. They keep it safe. Others should not know it.

clues.title: Make it tricky
clues.body: A good password is hard to guess. '1234' is too easy. A tricky one keeps your things safer.

clues.title: Like a locked door
clues.body: A password locks your account like a key locks a door. If you give the key away, others can get in.

clues.title: Our class turtle
clues.body: Our class has a turtle named Speedy. Speedy walks very, very slowly. This is a fun fact, but it will not open a lock.

locks.title: Sharing a Password
locks.q: A friend asks for your password. What should you do?
options: Type it in the chat so everyone sees
Keep it private and do not share it
Tell it to your friend, but only quietly
locks.reason: A password is a secret key. If you share it, others can get into your things. Keeping it private, even from friends, is the safe choice.

locks.title: Safe Password Habits
locks.q: Check EVERY safe thing to do with a password.

items.t: Let a parent help you remember it
Write it on the board for all to see
Tell it to a friend in the chat

locks.reason: Safe habits keep your key secret — hide it, let a trusted grown-up help, and make it tricky. Writing it for everyone or telling a friend gives your key away, so we leave those unchecked.

locks.title: The Secret Key
locks.q: The secret word that locks your account, like a key locks a door, is a ______.
locks.reason: A password is your secret key. Keeping it private is how you keep your account and your things safe.

locks.title: Someone Wants Your Password
locks.q: Someone asks for your password. Tap the steps in the RIGHT order.
locks.reason: First do NOT share it. Then TELL a trusted grown-up who asked. Then keep it PRIVATE and safe. That keeps your key yours.
